---
title: "gevp"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`gevp.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gevp.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `gevp` {#gevp}

```python
def gevp(C: np.ndarray, t0=0)
```

Returns eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the GEVP (Generalized EigenValue Problem)

.. ldt-id:: GEVP-gevp

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gevp.py#L7){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
